.github/workflows/.purpose: verify workflow dispatch stays aligned with local CI wrappers

.gitignore.purpose: verify ignored artifacts do not hide source files

.gitlab-ci.yml.purpose: verify GitLab dispatch stays aligned with local CI wrappers

Cargo.lock.purpose: verify dependency lock stays in sync

Cargo.toml.purpose: verify the package manifest stays parseable

README.md.purpose: verify the repo README stays in sync

agent/.purpose: verify the Jankurai metadata bundle stays clean

ops/.purpose: verify CI wrappers and hooks stay runnable

rust-toolchain.toml.purpose: verify the Rust toolchain pin stays parseable

scripts/.purpose: verify local CI helper scripts parse

src/.purpose: verify the crate body and unit tests stay green

crates/domain/.purpose: verify the domain error surface stays compiled

crates/domain/AGENTS.md.purpose: verify domain repair guidance stays paired with tests

crates/domain/Cargo.toml.purpose: verify domain crate manifest stays compiled
